description: Create a multi-page clinical decision tree diagram for the ESI (Emergency Severity Index) v4 triage algorithm in draw.io, using the specification in ~/Desktop/esi_v4_algorithm.txt. The diagram must accurately reflect the algorithm logic, including the resource counting and vital signs check branches. Page 1 must contain the flowchart using diamond shapes for decision points and rounded rectangles for the five ESI Level outcomes, connected by labeled branching conditions. Color-code the outcome nodes: Level 1 (Red), Level 2 (Orange), Level 3 (Yellow), Level 4 (Green), and Level 5 (Blue). Page 2 must provide a legend with text definitions for the five levels. Save the editable diagram to ~/Desktop/esi_triage_tree.drawio and export the Page 1 flowchart to ~/Desktop/esi_triage_tree.png.
